sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35907" key="e)noi/keios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνοίκ-ειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contained in a house</tr_>: <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰ ἐ.</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">furniture, contents of a house, Rev.Et.Gr.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0719.tlg004.perseus-grc1:32:171" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.171</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (delos, <date TEIform="date">iv/iii B. C.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
